attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.BILL_RATE_ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.STD_BILL_RATE_SCHEDULE, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.PERSON_ID, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.JOB_ID, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.EXPENDITURE_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.NON_LABOR_RESOURCE, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.RATE, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.BILL_RATE_UNIT, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.MARKUP_PERCENTAGE, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.ORG_ID, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.BILL_RATE_SCH_ID, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.JOB_GROUP_ID, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.RATE_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.RESOURCE_CLASS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.RES_CLASS_ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL,
 (
 select BILL_RATE_ORGANIZATION_ID ,STD_BILL_RATE_SCHEDULE ,START_DATE_ACTIVE ,PERSON_ID ,JOB_ID ,EXPENDITURE_TYPE ,NON_LABOR_RESOURCE ,ORG_ID ,RESOURCE_CLASS_CODE ,
RES_CLASS_ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL
 minus
 select BILL_RATE_ORGANIZATION_ID ,STD_BILL_RATE_SCHEDULE ,START_DATE_ACTIVE ,PERSON_ID ,JOB_ID ,EXPENDITURE_TYPE ,NON_LABOR_RESOURCE ,ORG_ID ,RESOURCE_CLASS_CODE ,
RES_CLASS_ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.BILL_RATE_ORGANIZATION_ID = STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.BILL_RATE_ORGANIZATION_ID and ACM.STD_BILL_RATE_SCHEDULE=STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.STD_BILL_RATE_SCHEDULE and 
 ACM.START_DATE_ACTIVE=STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.START_DATE_ACTIVE and coalesce(ACM.PERSON_ID,-999)=coalesce(STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.PERSON_ID ,-999)and 
 ACM.JOB_ID=STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.JOB_ID and coalesce(ACM.EXPENDITURE_TYPE ,-999)=coalesce(STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.EXPENDITURE_TYPE ,-999)and 
 coalesce(ACM.NON_LABOR_RESOURCE ,-999)=coalesce(STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.NON_LABOR_RESOURCE ,-999) and ACM.ORG_ID=STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.ORG_ID and 
 coalesce(ACM.RESOURCE_CLASS_CODE ,-999)=coalesce(STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.RESOURCE_CLASS_CODE ,-999) and coalesce(ACM.RES_CLASS_ORGANIZATION_ID ,-999)=coalesce(STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.RES_CLASS_ORGANIZATION_ID ,-999) and 
 ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_BILL_RATES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME
